description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house surrounded by lush landscaping and mature trees, with a prominent driveway leading to the front entrance. The house features a light-colored exterior, a dark gable roof, and multiple symmetrically arranged windows. The backyard includes a spacious swimming pool, a paved patio area, and a privacy hedge enclosing the property. The front yard is neatly manicured, with flowering shrubs and two parked cars visible near the entrance. The property is enclosed by a low wall, providing a sense of privacy and separation from the street. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and modern suburban architectural influences.
description: A spacious two-story suburban house with a dark gable roof, light exterior, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool enclosed by trees and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with two cars, manicured front yard, and partial view of the backyard pool.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the full swimming pool, patio area, and dense tree coverage at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backyard pool, patio, privacy hedge, and the back facade of the house with multiple windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, front yard, and the side of the house with less visible landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, small porch, and flanking columns, accented by decorative shrubs and a paved driveway.
